upright.runes.rune.fehu: Fehu signals earned wealth, prosperity and the rewards that flow from your own effort.
upright.runes.rune.uruz: Uruz brings raw vitality, strength and the untamed energy to forge new beginnings.
upright.runes.rune.thurisaz: Thurisaz warns of a sudden challenge or defensive force that, if respected, becomes protection.
upright.runes.rune.ansuz: Ansuz heralds wisdom, communication and a timely message worth heeding.
upright.runes.rune.raidho: Raidho marks a journey, progress and movement in tune with the right rhythm.
upright.runes.rune.kenaz: Kenaz kindles insight, creativity and the inner fire that illuminates the way forward.
upright.runes.rune.gebo: Gebo speaks of generous exchange, partnership and gifts freely given and received.
upright.runes.rune.wunjo: Wunjo promises joy, harmony and the contentment of wishes fulfilled.
upright.runes.rune.hagalaz: Hagalaz brings disruptive upheaval that clears the ground for necessary change.
upright.runes.rune.nauthiz: Nauthiz reflects need, constraint and the resilience born of patient endurance.
upright.runes.rune.isa: Isa counsels stillness, a freezing of events and a time to wait rather than act.
upright.runes.rune.jera: Jera rewards patient effort with a fruitful harvest in the fullness of time.
upright.runes.rune.eihwaz: Eihwaz offers steadfast endurance and protection through transformation and trial.
upright.runes.rune.perthro: Perthro reveals hidden chance, mystery and the unfolding of fate's secrets.
upright.runes.rune.algiz: Algiz extends protection, sanctuary and a guiding link to higher guidance.
upright.runes.rune.sowilo: Sowilo radiates success, vitality and the clarifying power of the sun.
upright.runes.rune.tiwaz: Tiwaz upholds justice, honour and the courage to act with integrity.
upright.runes.rune.berkano: Berkano nurtures growth, fertility and the gentle beginnings of new life.
upright.runes.rune.ehwaz: Ehwaz signifies trusted partnership, steady progress and harmonious movement together.
upright.runes.rune.mannaz: Mannaz reflects the self, community and your place within the wider human web.
upright.runes.rune.laguz: Laguz flows with intuition, emotion and the deep currents of the unconscious.
upright.runes.rune.ingwaz: Ingwaz gathers potential within, promising fertile completion and a project brought to term.
upright.runes.rune.dagaz: Dagaz heralds breakthrough, awakening and the dawning light of transformation.
upright.runes.rune.othala: Othala honours heritage, home and the lasting inheritance you build and pass on.

reversed.runes.rune.fehu: Reversed Fehu warns of loss, financial setbacks or wealth squandered through greed.
reversed.runes.rune.uruz: Reversed Uruz points to weakness, misdirected force or vitality drained by missed opportunity.
reversed.runes.rune.thurisaz: Reversed Thurisaz exposes reckless haste, spite or defences that turn against you.
reversed.runes.rune.ansuz: Reversed Ansuz signals miscommunication, deception or counsel that should not be trusted.
reversed.runes.rune.raidho: Reversed Raidho brings delay, disruption or a journey thrown off course.
reversed.runes.rune.kenaz: Reversed Kenaz dims the light, hinting at lost clarity, creative block or illusion.
reversed.runes.rune.gebo: Reversed Gebo warns of imbalance in giving, dependence or strings attached to a gift.
reversed.runes.rune.wunjo: Reversed Wunjo brings discord, disappointment and joy postponed or denied.
reversed.runes.rune.hagalaz: As a merkstave rune, Hagalaz intensifies crisis, stagnation and destructive upheaval.
reversed.runes.rune.nauthiz: Reversed Nauthiz deepens hardship, frustration and need born of poor choices.
reversed.runes.rune.isa: As a merkstave rune, Isa hardens into cold isolation, blockage and frozen plans.
reversed.runes.rune.jera: Reversed Jera brings poor timing, setbacks and effort that yields no harvest.
reversed.runes.rune.eihwaz: Reversed Eihwaz suggests obstacles, weakness or fear that halts necessary change.
reversed.runes.rune.perthro: Reversed Perthro hints at secrets withheld, misfortune or expectations left unmet.
reversed.runes.rune.algiz: Reversed Algiz warns of vulnerability, hidden danger or protection withdrawn.
reversed.runes.rune.sowilo: As a merkstave rune, Sowilo cautions against false hope, burnout or misused power.
reversed.runes.rune.tiwaz: Reversed Tiwaz points to injustice, dishonour or failing courage and resolve.
reversed.runes.rune.berkano: Reversed Berkano signals stalled growth, family discord or barrenness of plans.
reversed.runes.rune.ehwaz: Reversed Ehwaz warns of restlessness, mistrust or partnership pulling out of step.
reversed.runes.rune.mannaz: Reversed Mannaz reflects self-deception, isolation or strained relations with others.
reversed.runes.rune.laguz: Reversed Laguz warns of overwhelming emotion, confusion or intuition ignored.
reversed.runes.rune.ingwaz: As a merkstave rune, Ingwaz suggests stagnation, frustrated potential or effort that cannot bear fruit.
reversed.runes.rune.dagaz: As a merkstave rune, Dagaz cautions against blindness, false dawns or change resisted.
reversed.runes.rune.othala: Reversed Othala warns of broken ties, lost inheritance or clinging to outworn tradition.
